form.formComment: Latest effort finished 7th over 390m at this track beaten 6 lengths (23.09) behind Rivia Umiko in a Grade 5 on April 6. Leading chance who should prove hard to beat.

form.formComment: Goes well at this track and trip. At the last start finished 4th over 390m at this track beaten 7 lengths (22.60) behind Paw Gusto in a Grade 5 on April 6. Has a slick 22.22 PB at this course and distance. Among the chances.

form.formComment: Was a winner three back at this track then finished in the minors before missing the frame last time when fourth (23.97) at Bendigo. Has ability and looks one of the hopes in this.

form.formComment: Missed the frame latest (22.72) when sixth over 390m at this track in a Grade 5. Has three successes and four minors from 11 starts from box 4. Looks well placed and should feature.

form.formComment: Got back last start and could only manage fourth but before that won by half a length at Bendigo (23.94) beating Fred The Fox in a Special conditions H on March 31. Prepared to risk on this occasion.

form.formComment: Hasn't shown any early speed lately and tends to spot them a start in her races, Last start finished fourth over 390m at this track, beaten 6 lengths. Hard to tip with any confidence.
